examples: the rawness of the midnight air

meanings.definition: the state of being crude and incomplete and imperfect
examples: the study was criticized for incompleteness of data but it stimulated further research
the rawness of his diary made it unpublishable

meanings.definition: a pain that is felt (as when the area is touched)
examples: the best results are generally obtained by inserting the needle into the point of maximum tenderness
after taking a cold, rawness of the larynx and trachea come on

meanings.definition: lack of experience and the knowledge and understanding derived from experience
examples: their poor behavior was due to the rawness of the troops
